---
title: "Coverage"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Coverage

Coverage and validation resources for DPmixGPD. This page points to test maps, status artifacts, and reproducible coverage commands.

[Coverage map in tests](https://github.com/arnabaich96/DPmixGPD/blob/master/tests/testthat/COVERAGE_MAP.md){.btn .btn-primary}
[Codecov project](https://codecov.io/gh/arnabaich96/DPmixGPD){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

::: {.grid-3}

::: {.cardx}
### Local coverage run
Use project tooling to generate coverage artifacts.

```r
source("tools/coverage.R")
```

or

```r
source("tools/run_covr_progress.R")
```
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Status helpers
Coverage utilities exposed in pkgdown reference:
- [coverage_status](pkgdown/reference/coverage_status.html)
- [read_coverage_status](pkgdown/reference/read_coverage_status.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### High-value tests
Start with these for fast confidence:
- `tests/testthat/test-smoke-core-workflows.R`
- `tests/testthat/test-vignette-coverage.R`
- `tests/testthat/test-kernels.R`
:::

:::

:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Where to go next

1. [Developers](developers.html) for build/check workflows.
2. [Reference](reference.html) for status/helper function details.
3. [News](news.html) for release and docs updates.

:::
:::
